Container.Name: activitywatch-sync
Container.Overview: ActivityWatch aw-sync daemon. Every ~5 minutes it reconciles the per-device sqlite files in the shared Syncthing folder into the activitywatch-server container over its REST API. Deploy alongside activitywatch-server on the same docker network. The sync folder is written to each pass, so it must be mounted read-write.

Config.Name: Sync folder (read-write)
Config.Description: The Syncthing folder holding every device's per-device sqlite files. Must be read-write.
